metadata.description: Self-hosted infrastructure management plugins for Cloudflare, Proxmox, Home Assistant, and UniFi OS.

plugins.name: cloudflare-extended
plugins.description: Manage Cloudflare DNS records, Tunnels, zones, and cache purge.

plugins.name: proxmox-manager
plugins.description: Full Proxmox VE management — VMs, snapshots, storage, and Kubernetes cluster provisioning.

plugins.name: homeassistant-manager
plugins.description: Full Home Assistant management — devices, automations, scenes, scripts, and notifications.

plugins.name: unifi-network
plugins.description: Manage UniFi network devices, clients, WiFi SSIDs, VLANs, port forwarding, and firewall rules.

plugins.name: unifi-protect
plugins.description: Manage UniFi Protect cameras, motion events, smart detection, recordings, and snapshots.

plugins.name: unifi-access
plugins.description: Manage UniFi Access doors, users, door groups, PIN/NFC credentials, and activity logs.
